request_text:
Implement the following plan in this repository exactly, preserving existing behavior unless explicitly changed. 

[PLAN]
Framework and CLI assumptions in this plan were checked against the current official FastAPI, Starlette, argon2-cffi, and Codex documentation.

1. Goal: fully align with PRD and close gaps.
Corrections:
1) HTMX integration for Ops UI
2) CSRF on login
3) unauthenticated browser redirects to /login
4) add README.md and .env.example if missing/incomplete
5) initialize system_state.bootstrap_version
6) complete deterministic bootstrap/runbook path
7) harden AI action validation for unsafe auto-public replies
8) remove fragile prompt transport via large CLI arg
9) make static/template paths cwd-independent
10) broaden password verification error handling for malformed hashes

2. Non-goals: no SPA, SessionMiddleware auth, OAuth/SSO, Slack/SMTP notifications, web search in worker, repo writes by Codex worker, OCR, non-image attachments, edit/delete ticket content, patch generation by Codex.

3. Work order:
1. foundations
2. auth/browser UX
3. HTMX
4. AI safety policy
5. bootstrap/system-state
6. docs/env files
7. tests

4. Workstream A:
A1 path resolution module-relative in app/main.py + app/ui.py using Path(__file__).resolve(); keep /static + template names unchanged; create_app and scripts/run_web.py --check must work outside repo root.
A2 shared/security.py verify_password returns False for malformed/invalid hashes; no signature change; add tests; no info leaks.
A3 worker/codex_runner.py stop passing full prompt as argv tail; keep prompt.txt persisted and final.json canonical; keep required codex flags and worker state behavior; prefer stdin if supported else short fixed arg instructing read prompt.txt.

5. Workstream B:
B1 Add server-side login CSRF with preauth session table + cookie. GET /login creates/refreshes preauth session + embeds csrf token. POST /login validates csrf; success creates auth session, invalidates preauth, clears preauth cookie; failure stays on login and rotates/refreshes csrf. No SessionMiddleware.
B2 Unauth browser access to protected HTML routes redirects to /login with safe internal next; reject external/protocol next. Wrong-role authenticated access gets browser 403 (no redirect loop). Keep JSON/health behavior unchanged.

6. Workstream C:
C1 load local vendored HTMX in base template.
C2 /ops filter form: hx-get, hx-target, hx-push-url=true; stable rows container id; GET /ops returns full template normally and rows partial for HX-Request true; non-JS fallback preserved.
C3 same for /ops/board with columns fragment.
C4 do not change view-tracking semantics; filters/list-board must not update ticket_views.last_viewed_at.

7. Workstream D:
D1 tighten worker/triage.py validate_triage_result enforcing:
- ask_clarification => needs_clarification true + non-empty public_reply_markdown
- non-clarification should require needs_clarification false (or strict safe behavior)
- auto_public_reply => auto_public_reply_allowed true, evidence_found true, non-empty reply, confidence >= AUTO_SUPPORT_REPLY_MIN_CONFIDENCE
- auto_public_reply allowed only for support + access_config; reject bug/feature/unknown (+data_ops unless explicitly approved)
- auto_confirm_and_route => auto_public_reply_allowed true, non-empty reply, confidence >= AUTO_CONFIRM_INTENT_MIN_CONFIDENCE
- draft_public_reply => auto_public_reply_allowed false + non-empty reply
- route_dev_ti may have empty public reply
- reject >3 clarifying questions and contradictory combos
- preserve existing after-2-clarification-rounds route-to-Dev/TI override.

8. Workstream E:
E1 ensure system_state defaults include bootstrap_version and worker_heartbeat via ensure_system_state_defaults called in idempotent startup/bootstrapping spots at least scripts/bootstrap_workspace.py and worker startup before poll loop (optional web startup).
E2 deterministic bootstrap path + docs; either explicit sequence or convenience script. Admin bootstrap idempotent/prefer --if-missing in create_admin.py.

9. Workstream F:
F1 .env.example complete required vars:
APP_BASE_URL APP_SECRET_KEY DATABASE_URL UPLOADS_DIR TRIAGE_WORKSPACE_DIR REPO_MOUNT_DIR MANUALS_MOUNT_DIR CODEX_BIN CODEX_API_KEY CODEX_MODEL CODEX_TIMEOUT_SECONDS WORKER_POLL_SECONDS AUTO_SUPPORT_REPLY_MIN_CONFIDENCE AUTO_CONFIRM_INTENT_MIN_CONFIDENCE MAX_IMAGES_PER_MESSAGE MAX_IMAGE_BYTES SESSION_DEFAULT_HOURS SESSION_REMEMBER_DAYS
F2 README.md include purpose/scope, stack, env vars, bootstrap sequence, migrations, bootstrap workspace, create admin, run web/worker smoke checks, tests, read-only repo-aware worker, no Slack/email/SSO in stage 1.

10. Workstream G tests:
- auth/browser redirect + csrf + safe next + role 403 tests
- cwd path-resolution test
- malformed hash verify_password false and no login 500
- HTMX fragment response tests for /ops and /ops/board, full templates on normal GET, no ticket_views updates from list/board
- AI validation matrix tests
- Codex prompt transport tests (no full prompt argv tail; prompt.txt and final.json behavior + flags)
- bootstrap/system_state defaults tests + existence/content checks for .env.example + README + smoke checks after bootstrap

11. Keep minimal local changes; stable routes/table names/state transitions unless required; preserve stage-1 boundaries.

12. Acceptance checklist: complete all items implied above before done.
